mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, name, employee_id, role, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version FROM users WHERE deleted = 0
AND ( username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employee_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted = 0
AND ( username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employee_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
